title: CVE-2000-0611 — CVSS 5.0 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2000-0611

CVSS Score: 5.0 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2000-06-23T04:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

The default configuration of NetWin dMailWeb and cwMail trusts all POP servers, which allows attackers to bypass normal authentication and cause a denial of service.

References: http://archives.neohapsis.com/archives/bugtraq/2000-06/0243.html, http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/1391, https://exchange.xforce.ibmcloud.com/vulnerabilities/4771
